verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Looking for answers, you need a way out You've been trapped in that trial full of sorrow and doubt You saw a trickle of sunlight but you found no escape Just hold on to his promises, he said he'd make a way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He'll make a way in the middle of nowhere When it seems no one really cares he is there by your side He'll make a way when you feel Satan close in He'll make a way right on time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Standing at the Red Sea, no place to go Pharaoh's army was closing in, they'd soon overthrow But right out of nowhere came a mighty strong hand He rolled back the water, he made a way out again
